name: Selina
bio:
Talented Vampire Mage good at high-output offensive magic. He showed a talent for magic from an early age.

Role: High Physical Damage
Specialty: A mid-backline Breakthrough-type hero with strong comprehensive damage output; can deal extra damage based on the target's maximum HP.

skillSlots.name: Abyssal Shadow Dive
skillSlots.description: Attacks 2 enemy with highest ATK for 200% M.DMG.

effects.name: Kindred Sorcery
effects.description: [Abyssal Shadow Dive] has 60% probability to apply [Bleed].
